title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.255 - Tenure of office of directors
text:
362.255.  Tenure of office of directors. — The directors shall, unless sooner removed or disqualified, hold office until the next annual meeting of the stockholders, and until their successors are elected and have qualified.
(RSMo 1939 § 7960) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5365; 1919 § 11748
